queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of a checking account status indicating no checking account on consumer credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: assessing how a credit history reflecting a critical account or other existing credits correlates with reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: evaluating the protective effect of a checking account status with a balance below zero DM on default probability in retail lending.
